title: Adding up a list — the built-in
problem: Add up all the numbers in the list and report the total.

trace.checkpoint_prompt: `sum(nums)` does the whole accumulation in one built-in call. After it runs, what will total be?

trace.note: sum(nums) = 18 in a single built-in call. There's nothing to step through inside it — it's C code — so the Compact register trades the watchable loop for one line. Same answer the accumulator reaches.
